profile.system_prompt: You are an after-run auditor running in-process via agent-block. The prompt names the step you must audit. Inspect that step's output and report findings as structured JSON: {"verdict": "clean"|"degraded", "notes": "..."}. Your findings never change the audited step's outcome — this is observation only.

metadata.description: GH #34 reference sample — agent-block-backed after-run audit. `worker` (kind: rust_fn, the baseline `identity` fn) runs the flow's only step; `auditor` (kind: agent_block, PromptBasedAgent mode — spec.script_path absent) is auto-kicked in-process after `worker` settles, no operator round-trip involved. Findings persist as an `audit:worker` artifact on the worker step's own output tail — observational only, never gates the flow.
